hse_types.label_vn: Vệ sinh chung / sắp xếp vật tư
component_labels_en: Garbage outside designated areas
No implement 5S standards for area
Cleaning/Maintenance inadequate
Worker eat and drink at the workplace causing unhygienic conditions Cng nhn n un
Workers resting at the workplace (resting is only allowed in designated areas)
Concrete or waste materials are not stored in designated areas
Do not pump water regularly (leaving stagnant water causes unsanitary conditions)
Materials are not arranged neatly
Smoking or cigarette butts at the workplace
Do not isolate the area to prevent dust from spreading outside
No signs to define the material storage area such as warning tape, signal board
Not or lacking Signal board, warning tape
No/lack of installation area signs
Materials are risk of falling from height
Materials falling
The ends of the iron rods are not covered
Scaffolding/Working platform without handrails or unsafe
Unsafe Scaffolding: Lack of Planks/Crossbars/Supports, Ladders...
no type  Scaffolding and Platform
Using scaffolding that has not been checked & approved for use or don't have tag
Components such as cross braces, supports, clamps, and handrails...are not securely connected
The scaffolding using to support objects is not safe and needs additional support
Scaffolding missing details (cross, clamp, toeboard) or unsafe.
Scaffolding wheels smaller than 150mm or damaged
Scaffolding/Working platform at risk of collapse
Scaffolding/Working platform not checking
The anchoring/reinforcement positions of the scaffolding system are unsafe

hse_types.label_en: Missing handrails / edge or opening protection
hse_types.label_vn: Thiếu lan can bảo vệ mép, lỗ mở
component_labels_en: Lack of hard handrails at edges deeper than 1.5 meters or or request
No signs, hard handrail/warning around the pit
No safety handrail
Not covering the manhole
Openings not properly covered – risk of fall hazard
Standing on handrails to work or working in position unsafety

hse_types.label_vn: Máy móc/thiết bị không an toàn hoặc thiếu chứng từ
component_labels_en: Lack of guarding on moving parts:
Using damaged, hand-made or unsafe machinery and equipment
Missing inspection stamp or certificates
CO/CQ record, inspection, or maintenance records not maintained
Gas cylinder, compressed air not fixed on shelf/trolley
No non-return valve or flashback arrestor

hse_types.label_vn: Lối đi / lối tiếp cận không an toàn
component_labels_en: Unsafe walkway: Materials falling from above, obstructive objects, risk of falling, no handrail for stair, no warning tapes, etc.
No access/unsafe access
No safety ways or unsafe movement: there are obstacles, too narrow…
No safe walkway is provided

hse_types.label_en: Working at heights without personal fall protection
hse_types.label_vn: Làm việc trên cao không có dây an toàn
component_labels_en: Working at heights without safety harness
Wearing safety harness but no hooking
Working below without protection
Do not stand on the top of the ladder (sitting only)
No 3-square safety net to protect falling objects

hse_types.label_vn: Thao tác nâng hạ không an toàn
component_labels_en: The crane or load lifting is risk of collision with people or objects.
The material and equipment trans/lifting area must not be isolated, without warning signs or cover falling objects
Cable hooks used to lift objects are unsafe
Cable hook without safety latch or not good
Cable hook without tongue
Let the other holding on vehicles
Not transportation on time

hse_types.label_vn: Nguy cơ điện / tủ điện không an toàn
component_labels_en: Electric wires are not hung high
There is no access to the electrical panel or the access is obstructed
MSB/DBs panel don't have cover, internal lock, or emergency button
No information of the PIC on the electrical panel

hse_types.label_vn: Điều kiện công trường không an toàn
component_labels_en: Lack or missing of lighting for walkway or working areas
Unsafe standing position: weak ground, no padding, uneven surface
No roof
The pressure testing area has no warnings (signal board, handrails...) or if there are, they are not clear.

hse_types.label_en: Hazardous chemicals / waste / spills / improper storage
hse_types.label_vn: Hóa chất / chất thải nguy hại / rò rỉ / lưu trữ không an toàn
component_labels_en: Hazardous waste is not collected regularly.
Hazardous chemicals or waste that are not properly collected or treated
Let the paint, gasoline, chemicals... spill and fall into the environment

hse_types.label_en: Missing or inadequate personal protective equipment
hse_types.label_vn: Thiếu trang bị bảo hộ cá nhân
component_labels_en: Working with metal without gloves
Operator not degree/Group 3 safety card

hse_types.label_vn: Nguy cơ cháy / công việc sinh nhiệt
component_labels_en: No fire extinguisher
Not prevent sparks
Ladder is damaged, unsafe, such as cracked, bent, warped, etc.
Common working area
Housekeeping
PPEs
Garbage area - Waste
